layoutRegions.name: decision-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarizes reopen request pressure, temporary regrant count, dependency gaps, and expiring exceptions.

layoutRegions.name: regrant-queue
layoutRegions.purpose: Shows access reopen requests with owners, reasons, dependency evidence, TTL, and rollback scope.

layoutRegions.name: exception-controls
layoutRegions.purpose: Tracks owner acknowledgements, dependency proof, expiry timers, audit events, and approval guardrails.

components.name: ReopenRequestCard
components.purpose: Temporary regrant request card with TTL, dependency evidence, and rollback scope.
interactions: status labels remain visible at all widths
request facts wrap without horizontal scrolling

components.name: ExpiryTimer
components.purpose: Compact countdown row for temporary regrant expiry health.
interactions: row layout collapses to one column on narrow viewports

components.name: GuardrailChecklist
components.purpose: Approval safety checklist for exception reopen decisions.
interactions: check markers are semantic token mixes

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
